    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    G

    GameEngine - Class in jogo.engine
    Utility class responsible for managing core game logic and validating action requests performed by the players.
    GameEngineTest - Class in jogo.engine
    Test class for the GameEngine class.
    GameEngineTest() - Constructor for class jogo.engine.GameEngineTest
     
    GameException - Exception Class in jogo.exceptions
    Base exception class for all generic and custom game logic violations.
    GameException(String) - Constructor for exception class jogo.exceptions.GameException
    Constructs a new GameException with the specified detail message.
    GameSession - Class in jogo.engine
    Manages the core game state, including player turns, day progression, and invoking the event system to update game modifiers.
    GameSession() - Constructor for class jogo.engine.GameSession
     
    GameSessionTest - Class in jogo.engine
    Test class for the GameSession class.
    GameSessionTest() - Constructor for class jogo.engine.GameSessionTest
     
    generateResource(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.City
    Overridden to bypass resource generation, as cities do not yield physical materials.
    generateResource(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Forest
    Executes the daily resource generation, adding the calculated amount of wood into the owner's inventory based on current profit and modifiers.
    generateResource(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Mine
    Executes the daily stone extraction, appending the modified yield quantity directly into the owning player's inventory asset map.
    generateResource(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Ranch
    Executes the daily harvest, multiplying the baseline food yield by the active modifier and adding it directly to the owner's inventory map.
    generateResource(int) - Method in class jogo.models.Structures.Structures
    Triggers the daily resource acquisition routine, forcing concrete implementations to resolve and append materials directly to the owning player's inventory.
    generateResources(int) - Method in class jogo.engine.WorldMap
    Iterates through the entire map grid to trigger resource generation for all existing structures.
    getActionPoints() - Method in class jogo.models.Player

    getActualPlayerEndDayCosts() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameSession
    Returns the resources that will be consumed at the end of the day for the current active player.

    getWinner() - Method in class jogo.engine.GameSession
    Determines the winner of the game session once the match has concluded.
